---
title: "People"
subtitle: "The Cremer Lab at Stanford University"
---

```{=html}
<div id="bio-modal" class="bio-modal-overlay" onclick="closeBioModal(event)">
  <div class="bio-modal-box">
    <button class="bio-modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('bio-modal').style.display='none'">&times;</button>
    <div class="bio-modal-name" id="bio-modal-name"></div>
    <div class="bio-modal-title" id="bio-modal-title"></div>
    <div class="bio-modal-text" id="bio-modal-text"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
function openBio(btn) {
  document.getElementById('bio-modal-name').textContent  = btn.dataset.name;
  document.getElementById('bio-modal-title').textContent = btn.dataset.title;
  document.getElementById('bio-modal-text').textContent  = btn.dataset.bio;
  document.getElementById('bio-modal').style.display = 'flex';
}
function closeBioModal(e) {
  if (e.target.id === 'bio-modal') document.getElementById('bio-modal').style.display = 'none';
}
document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
  if (e.key === 'Escape') document.getElementById('bio-modal').style.display = 'none';
});
</script>
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import pandas as pd
import re
import html

df = pd.read_csv("data/people.csv", dtype=str).fillna("")

def year_left(dates):
    years = re.findall(r'\b\d{4}\b', dates)
    return years[-1] if years else ""

_all     = df[df["alumni"] != "true"].copy()
_jonas   = _all[_all["name"] == "Jonas Cremer"]
_others  = _all[_all["name"] != "Jonas Cremer"].copy()
_others["_last"] = _others["name"].str.split().str[-1]
_others  = _others.sort_values("_last").drop(columns="_last")
current  = pd.concat([_jonas, _others], ignore_index=True)

_alumni  = df[df["alumni"] == "true"].copy()
_alumni["_year"] = _alumni["dates"].apply(year_left)
alumni   = _alumni.sort_values("_year", ascending=False).drop(columns="_year")

SOCIAL_ICONS = [
    ("email",   "envelope",         "mailto:"),
    ("twitter", "twitter",          ""),
    ("bluesky", "cloud",            ""),
    ("website", "globe",            ""),
    ("orcid",   "person-badge",     ""),
    ("scholar", "mortarboard-fill", ""),
    ("github",  "github",           ""),
]

def social_icons(row):
    parts = []
    for key, icon, prefix in SOCIAL_ICONS:
        val = row.get(key, "")
        if val:
            url = prefix + val if key == "email" else val
            label = key.capitalize()
            parts.append(f'<a href="{url}" title="{label}" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-{icon}"></i></a>')
    return "".join(parts)

# ── Current members grid ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print('<div class="people-grid">')
for _, row in current.iterrows():
    img = row["image"].strip()
    bio = row["bio"].strip()

    if bio:
        click_attrs = (
            f' onclick="openBio(this)"'
            f' data-name="{html.escape(row["name"])}"'
            f' data-title="{html.escape(row["title"])}"'
            f' data-bio="{html.escape(bio)}"'
            f' style="cursor:pointer"'
        )
    else:
        click_attrs = ""

    if img:
        img_tag = f'<img src="images/members/{img}" alt="{html.escape(row["name"])}" onerror="this.src=\'images/members/placeholder.svg\'"{click_attrs}>'
    else:
        img_tag = f'<img src="images/members/placeholder.svg" alt="Portrait coming soon"{click_attrs}>'

    bio_btn = ""
    if bio:
        bio_btn = (
            f'<button class="bio-toggle" onclick="openBio(this)"'
            f' data-name="{html.escape(row["name"])}"'
            f' data-title="{html.escape(row["title"])}"'
            f' data-bio="{html.escape(bio)}">About</button>'
        )

    print(f"""
<div class="person-card">
  {img_tag}
  <div class="person-name">{row['name']}</div>
  <div class="person-title">{row['title']}</div>
  <div class="person-socials">{social_icons(row)}</div>
  {bio_btn}
</div>""")
print("</div>")

# ── Lab Life gallery ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import glob, os

captions_df = pd.read_csv("data/social_photos.csv", dtype=str).fillna("")
captions = dict(zip(captions_df["filename"], captions_df["caption"]))

photos = sorted(glob.glob("images/social/*"))
photos = [p for p in photos if os.path.splitext(p)[1].lower() in {".jpg", ".jpeg", ".png", ".gif", ".webp"}]

if photos:
    print("\n---\n\n## Lab Life\n")
    print('<div class="social-gallery">')
    for path in photos:
        fname = os.path.basename(path)
        desc = captions.get(fname, os.path.splitext(fname)[0].replace("_", " ").title())
        print(f'<figure class="social-figure">')
        print(f'  <a href="{path}" class="lightbox" data-gallery="lab-social" data-description="{html.escape(desc)}">')
        print(f'    <img src="{path}" alt="{html.escape(desc)}" class="social-photo">')
        print(f'  </a>')
        print(f'  <figcaption class="social-caption">{html.escape(desc)}</figcaption>')
        print(f'</figure>')
    print('</div>')

# ── Alumni table ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
print("\n---\n\n## Alumni\n")
print('<table class="alumni-table">')
print("<thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Role</th><th>Year</th><th>Now</th></tr></thead><tbody>")
for _, row in alumni.iterrows():
    now      = row.get("now", "")
    now_link = row.get("now_link", "")
    now_text = f'<a href="{now_link}" target="_blank">{now}</a>' if now_link and now else now
    print(f"<tr><td><strong>{row['name']}</strong></td><td>{row['title']}</td><td>{year_left(row['dates'])}</td><td>{now_text}</td></tr>")
print("</tbody></table>")
```
